title: #function
breadcrumbs: ProcScript: Precompiler Directives and Uniface Constants
text: #function Insert a global ProcScript module. #function Library:GlobalProcScript Parameters Library —name of the library containing the global ProcScript function GlobalProcScript —name of the global ProcScript function Description The #function directive enables you to include a global ProcScript module in a code container so that it is treated as a local ProcScript function. The #function is resolved at compile time. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
